name: color
description: Palette accent for the active thumb and (in `tonal`) the track tint.

name: variant
description: Visual variant. `default` — gray track, accent thumb. `tonal` — accent-tinted track. `border` — outlined track, no fill. `relief` — sunken track, raised thumb.

name: size
description: Sizing scale — shared with Button (`xl` | `large` | `medium` | `small` | `mini`). Outer height matches a Button at the same size.

name: block
description: Stretch the group to fill the container width.
